posts.author: parri27 (Fede)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We installed Monday MCP for us -developers team- to update tracking hours directly from our AI tools and it turns out you cannot update it outside the UI. It would be wonderful for us to have the chance to create tasks and directly adding hours to them without having to use the UI.

Would it be possible for you to adapt this and let the users update that column? Are you considering this for the short or mid term?

Thanks.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to update the time tracking column using Claude.
